ohtani.title: Shohei Ohtani tosses six scoreless in Dodgers' win
ohtani.blurb: Shohei Ohtani fans six over six scoreless innings and Kyle Tucker launches a two-run homer to lead the Dodgers to a 7-0 win over the D-backs

imanaga.title: Velázquez, Saggese and Herrera power Cardinals to win
imanaga.blurb: Nelson Velázquez, Thomas Saggese and Iván Herrera each homered as the Cardinals' bullpen tossed six innings of one-run ball in a 6-5 win

suzuki.title: 【鈴木誠也が23試合ぶりのHR！｜試合ハイライト】アスレチックスvsカブス MLB2026シーズン 6.3

yoshida.title: Five-run inning lifts Red Sox to win
yoshida.blurb: Boston's five-run inning, powered by Wilyer Abreu's two-run homer, lifts the Red Sox to a 8-1 win over the Orioles

okamoto.title: Mauricio Dubón, Ozzie Albies homer in Braves' win
okamoto.blurb: Mauricio Dubón and Ozzie Albies both go deep and Grant Holmes tosses a quality start in the Braves' 7-3 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Bryce Harper crushes a two-run homer in Phillies' win
matsui.blurb: Bryce Harper delivers a two-run home run and Aaron Nola strikes out eight in the Phillies' 3-2 win over the Padres
